info.title: Orion Health FHIR R4 API
info.description: The Orion Health API provides FHIR R4 (HL7 Fast Healthcare Interoperability Resources) compliant endpoints for accessing and managing clinical health data. It supports 33 FHIR resource types covering clinical data, care management, medications, patient demographics, and organizational information. The API enables interoperability across disparate healthcare systems by providing a standardized interface for patient records.

tags.name: Clinical
tags.description: Clinical observations, conditions, and diagnostic data

tags.name: Care Management
tags.description: Care plans, teams, encounters, and episodes of care

get.description: Search for patient records using FHIR search parameters.

parameters.name: _count
parameters.description: Maximum number of results per page.

200.description: FHIR Bundle of matching Patient resources.

post.description: Create a new Patient FHIR resource.

get.description: Retrieve a specific Patient resource by its FHIR ID.
Search for Condition resources (diagnoses, problems, health concerns).
Search for Observation resources (vitals, lab results, assessments).

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Date or date range (prefix with gt, lt, ge, le).

get.description: Search for AllergyIntolerance resources for a patient.

Returns the server's FHIR CapabilityStatement, describing supported resources, operations, and search parameters.

OAuth2.description: OAuth 2.0 authorization for accessing FHIR resources. Supports SMART on FHIR scopes.

scopes.patient/*.read: Read access to all patient resources
scopes.patient/*.write: Write access to all patient resources

Bundle.description: A FHIR Bundle containing search results.

Reference.description: A FHIR Reference to another resource.

BadRequest.description: Bad request. Invalid search parameters or malformed request.

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized. Missing or invalid OAuth2 token.
